task_completion.description: Navigate to the POI display configuration screen in the Sygic app.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Sygic GPS Navigation app is open and displaying the 'Points of Interest' or 'Custom POI' settings menu.
The toggle switch or checkbox next to 'Petrol Station' or 'Petrol/Gas Station' is in the ON or checked state.
The toggle switch or checkbox next to 'Parking' is in the ON or checked state.

task_completion.description: Disable all other POI categories to reduce clutter.
task_completion.visual_evidence: All other visible top-level categories in the settings list (such as Shopping, Accommodation, Food and Drink, Tourism, etc.) have their toggle switches or checkboxes in the OFF or unchecked state.

task_completion.description: Save a screenshot of the configuration screen to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal command (e.g., screencap) or file manager shows a screenshot being saved exactly to '/sdcard/tasks/customize_poi_display/poi_config_done.png'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Sygic app GUI to change settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: The trajectory shows the agent navigating through the Sygic app's menus and toggling switches, rather than just modifying preference files via terminal.

integrity.description: Verify the saved screenshot actually depicts the POI configuration screen.
integrity.visual_evidence: If the saved image is opened or previewed, it displays the Sygic POI settings menu with the correct toggles, not a blank screen or unrelated app.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not just echo a success message or create a fake file without performing the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: The trajectory must contain visual proof of the Sygic app's settings being modified before the screenshot command is executed.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Sygic uses top-level POI categories. 'Parking' and 'Petrol Station' are top-level categories that must be enabled. Other top-level categories like 'Shopping', 'Tourism', 'Accommodation', and 'Food and Drink' (or 'Eating & Drinking') must be disabled. Note that 'Hotel' and 'Restaurant' are subcategories; to disable them, their parent categories ('Accommodation' and 'Food and Drink') must be toggled off. The final screenshot must be saved to the exact path: /sdcard/tasks/customize_poi_display/poi_config_done.png.
